articles.title: World Cup 2026: Germany Stages Dramatic Comeback to Beat Ivory Coast 2–1
articles.excerpt: Germany completed a thrilling 2–1 comeback against Ivory Coast, with Deniz Undav scoring twice to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage.
articles.content:
Germany completed a thrilling 2–1 comeback against Ivory Coast, with Deniz Undav scoring twice to secure a place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage.
